reviewer.displayName: Alias el Chueco barrionuevo mas famoso por el nene

reviews.comment:
Me quise asociar y no te dan pelota , te dejan esperando en el telefono muy poco profesionales y abren los recreos y te cobran todo y despues te dicen que la pileta esta en reparacion , ni hablar de los baños y los protocolos

(Translated by Google)
I wanted to join and they don't pay attention to you, they leave you waiting on the phone, very unprofessional, and they open the breaks and charge you for everything and then they tell you that the pool is under repair, not to mention the bathrooms and the protocols
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5eGZtU2h3RRAB
